route53resolver.resolverconfig.CfnAbout: A complex type that contains information about a Resolver configuration for a VPC.

route53resolver.resolverconfig.Autodefin.Description: Represents the desired status of `AutodefinedReverse`. The only supported value on creation is `DISABLE`. Deletion of this resource will return `AutodefinedReverse` to its default value of `ENABLED`.

route53resolver.resolverconfig.ResourceI.Description: The ID of the Amazon Virtual Private Cloud VPC that you're configuring Resolver for.
